requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — SENCAMER / COVENIN Standards (120 V / 60 Hz / Type A/B)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——SENCAMER / COVENIN标准（120V / 60Hz / A/B型插头）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——SENCAMER / COVENIN標準（120V / 60Hz / A/B型插頭）

summary.en: Venezuela operates at 120 V / 60 Hz with Type A and Type B (ungrounded and grounded) plugs — the same as the United States. This is a significant advantage for Chinese exporters adapting US-specification hardware, as no voltage conversion or plug adaptation is needed. Electrical safety compliance is governed by SENCAMER through COVENIN standards that adopt IEC 62368-1 (audio/video and IT equipment safety) and related IEC standards. SENCAMER may require product conformity assessment or acceptance of IEC-based test reports; however, institutional capacity constraints in Venezuela mean enforcement can be inconsistent. CCC certification (to Chinese GB standards) does not substitute for SENCAMER/COVENIN conformity.
summary.zh: 委内瑞拉采用120V/60Hz及A/B型（无接地和有接地）插头——与美国相同。这对适配美规硬件的中国出口商是重大优势，无需进行电压转换或插头适配。电气安全合规由SENCAMER通过采用IEC 62368-1（音频/视频及IT设备安全）及相关IEC标准的COVENIN标准进行管理。SENCAMER可能要求产品合格评定或接受基于IEC的测试报告；但委内瑞拉的机构能力限制意味着执法可能不一致。CCC认证（依据中国GB标准）不可替代SENCAMER/COVENIN合规。
summary.zht: 委內瑞拉採用120V/60Hz及A/B型（無接地和有接地）插頭——與美國相同。這對適配美規硬件的中國出口商是重大優勢，無需進行電壓轉換或插頭適配。電氣安全合規由SENCAMER通過採用IEC 62368-1（音頻/視頻及IT設備安全）及相關IEC標準的COVENIN標準進行管理。SENCAMER可能要求產品合格評定或接受基於IEC的測試報告；但委內瑞拉的機構能力限制意味著執法可能不一致。CCC認證（依據中國GB標準）不可替代SENCAMER/COVENIN合規。

standards_or_laws: COVENIN standards adopting IEC 62368-1 (audio/video, IT and communications technology equipment safety)
COVENIN standards adopting IEC 60950-1 (legacy — information technology equipment safety)
SENCAMER Reglamentos Técnicos for consumer electrical/electronic equipment
NEC (National Electrical Code) influenced standards for 120 V / 60 Hz infrastructure

summary.en: China electrical safety: GB 4943.1 (adopting IEC 60950-1) and GB 62368-1 (adopting IEC 62368-1) are mandatory under the CCC scheme for IT and audio/video equipment. Chinese products are designed for 220 V / 50 Hz with Type A or I plugs as standard. US-specification products (120 V / 60 Hz, Type A/B) built for the American market align directly with Venezuelan voltage requirements — a technical compatibility that reduces adaptation cost when repurposing US-spec inventory for Venezuela.
summary.zh: 中国电气安全：GB 4943.1（采用IEC 60950-1）和GB 62368-1（采用IEC 62368-1）在CCC体系下对IT及音频/视频设备为强制要求。中国产品标准设计为220V/50Hz配A型或I型插头。为美国市场制造的美规产品（120V/60Hz，A/B型）与委内瑞拉电压要求直接兼容——这种技术兼容性在将美规库存转用于委内瑞拉时可降低适配成本。
summary.zht: 中國電氣安全：GB 4943.1（採用IEC 60950-1）和GB 62368-1（採用IEC 62368-1）在CCC體系下對IT及音頻/視頻設備為強制要求。中國產品標準設計為220V/50Hz配A型或I型插頭。為美國市場製造的美規產品（120V/60Hz，A/B型）與委內瑞拉電壓要求直接相容——這種技術相容性在將美規庫存轉用於委內瑞拉時可降低適配成本。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 (IEC 60950-1 adoption) — IT equipment safety, CCC mandatory
GB 62368-1 (IEC 62368-1 adoption) — audio/video/IT equipment safety, CCC mandatory

gap.en: PARTIAL TECHNICAL / FULL REGULATORY GAP — Voltage and plug type are fully compatible (120 V / 60 Hz / Type A/B), eliminating hardware adaptation. However, Chinese CCC certification under GB standards does not satisfy SENCAMER/COVENIN requirements. Separate COVENIN conformity assessment or SENCAMER-recognised IEC test report submission is required. Enforcement consistency in Venezuela may vary; independent verification of current SENCAMER reglamentos is essential.
gap.zh: 技术上部分差距/法规上完全差距——电压和插头类型完全兼容（120V/60Hz/A/B型），无需硬件适配。但依据GB标准的中国CCC认证不满足SENCAMER/COVENIN要求。须另行进行COVENIN合格评定或提交SENCAMER认可的IEC测试报告。委内瑞拉的执法一致性可能存在差异；须独立核验当前SENCAMER技术法规。
gap.zht: 技術上部分差距/法規上完全差距——電壓和插頭類型完全相容（120V/60Hz/A/B型），無需硬件適配。但依據GB標準的中國CCC認證不滿足SENCAMER/COVENIN要求。須另行進行COVENIN合格評定或提交SENCAMER認可的IEC測試報告。委內瑞拉的執法一致性可能存在差異；須獨立核驗當前SENCAMER技術法規。

source.publisher: SENCAMER — Servicio Autónomo Nacional de Normalización, Calidad, Metrología y Reglamentos Técnicos, Venezuela

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Venezuela's 120 V / 60 Hz / Type A/B electrical standard is fully compatible with US-specification hardware, removing the voltage adaptation burden that applies in most Latin American markets at 110–127 V. Chinese CCC safety certification is not recognised by SENCAMER; COVENIN-conformant electrical safety documentation must be obtained separately. Consult a qualified Venezuelan regulatory specialist for current SENCAMER reglamentos técnicos applicable to your device category.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 委内瑞拉120V/60Hz/A/B型电气标准与美规硬件完全兼容，消除了拉丁美洲大多数110–127V市场所需的电压适配负担。中国CCC安全认证不被SENCAMER承认；须单独取得符合COVENIN的电气安全文件。请咨询合格的委内瑞拉监管专业人士，了解适用于您的设备类别的当前SENCAMER技术法规。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 委內瑞拉120V/60Hz/A/B型電氣標準與美規硬件完全相容，消除了拉丁美洲大多數110–127V市場所需的電壓適配負擔。中國CCC安全認證不被SENCAMER承認；須單獨取得符合COVENIN的電氣安全文件。請諮詢合格的委內瑞拉監管專業人士，了解適用於您的設備類別的當前SENCAMER技術法規。
